message:
🐛 Fix AI button yellow flash during navigation (#879)

The AI status indicator briefly flashed yellow ("Connecting to agent...")
on every page navigation. Root cause: React 18 StrictMode double-mounting
broke the initialMountRef guard in useClusters(), causing
triggerAggressiveDetection() to fire on every mount. This set the agent
status to 'connecting' for ~400ms, which passed the 300ms debounce and
showed as a visible yellow flash.

Fix: Replace initialMountRef with a prev-value ref pattern that compares
isDemoMode to its previous value, which correctly survives StrictMode
double-mounts and only fires when demo mode truly changes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
